texto: Unlike my father and millions of Chinese, everyone in America—every man, woman and child, whether rich or poor— has the freedom to choose, freedom to shape his or her own destiny. Don’t you agree that you can better manage your own life than other people can?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Helen Raleigh que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Unlike my father and millions of Chinese, everyone in America—every man, woman and child, whether…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, inspirational-living, reflexao, com foco em inspiracao e reflexao.
